localProducts.title: Local Products
localProducts.description: Premium products tailored for local needs

OurStory.intro: Siantano is an Indonesian furniture company established in 1998. Starting as a small-scale wood processing business, Siantano has grown into a trusted furniture manufacturer serving both domestic and international markets. By prioritizing quality raw materials, precision in production processes, and designs that meet market demands, Siantano is committed to delivering furniture that is functional, durable, and aesthetically refined.

1998.text: Our journey began in 1998, when Siantano was first established as a small-scale wood processing business. With determination and hard work, we took our first steps in the Indonesian furniture industry.

2007.text: As market demand grew, in 2007 we began investing in modern production machinery. This step allowed us to significantly increase our capacity and maintain consistent product quality.

2009.text: In 2009, Siantano expanded its production facilities by building a larger warehouse and production area. This expansion marked an important milestone in our journey to serve a wider market.

present.text: Today, after more than two decades in the industry, Siantano has grown into a trusted furniture manufacturer with national and international distribution networks. We continue to innovate in design and production processes to deliver high-quality furniture that meets global standards.

ContactUs.description: For business inquiries, partnerships, or custom furniture projects, please get in touch with our team. We work with partners both locally and internationally to support project-specific and long-term requirements.
ContactUs.descriptionSecondary: You may reach us using the contact details below or submit an inquiry through the form, and our team will respond as soon as possible.
